seo.title: Residential Proxy Pricing | Flexible Plans for Every Team
seo.description: Compare MigaProxy residential proxy plans with transparent pricing, flexible traffic options, and reliable global coverage.

heroSection.title: Residential Proxies Pricing
heroSection.description: Transparent, volume-based plans built for teams that need global access, high success rates, and predictable performance.

plansSection.title: Tiered Pricing Plans
plansSection.description: Scale from starter packs to enterprise-grade volume. Rates decrease as your usage grows.

featuresSection.title: Built for Performance, Flexibility, and Reliability
featuresSection.description: Residential proxies that keep your workflows fast, adaptive, and private, whether you run a few jobs or thousands.

features.title: High success rates
features.description: Consistent performance with fast response times at scale.

features.title: Global geo-targeting
features.description: Target countries, regions, and cities with precision on-demand.

features.title: Unlimited concurrent sessions
features.description: Run large parallel workloads without caps on concurrent connections.

features.title: Secure & private network
features.description: Automatic rotation and privacy safeguards keep your traffic protected.

paymentsSection.title: Flexible Payments & Secure Checkout
paymentsSection.description: Pay with cards or digital wallets. All transactions are encrypted and secured end-to-end.

useCases.description: Confirm placements, detect fraud, and validate geo-specific campaigns.

useCases.title: SEO Monitoring

useCases.title: Market Research

useCases.title: Social Media Management

faqSection.title: Pricing FAQ
faqSection.description: Quick answers about usage, billing, and setup.

faqs.question: How is data usage measured?
faqs.answer: Usage is based on total bandwidth consumed. Both successful and failed requests count toward usage.

faqs.question: What billing cycles are available?
faqs.answer: Plans are billed monthly by default. Annual commitments are available for enterprise contracts.

faqs.question: Can I switch or upgrade plans anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time. We'll prorate the difference based on remaining balance.

faqs.question: How fast is setup?
faqs.answer: Provisioning is instant. Access credentials and endpoints are available immediately after purchase.
